subcodes.first_line: Know ye, O people of Bahá, that Satan hath united with the Satan of Persia, and they have acted treacherously against the Cause of their Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاعلموا یا اهل البهاء بان الشیطان اتحد مع شیطان العجم و غدروا فی امر ربهم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @call to action
